ddls:
CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, text, image) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the widget was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the widget is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated widget */,
  "release" TEXT /* Release version of the configuration */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., updOnStartup) */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., boolean, uint32) */,
  "possible_values" TEXT /* Possible values for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter's purpose */,
  "is_global" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is global */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_widget_configs" (
  "user_widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user widget configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget being configured */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting for the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is the default for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_widget_configs_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_widget_configs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget involved in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the action */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_logs_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget type */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the widget type is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated widget */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the widget */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_versions_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update policy */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated widget */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the update policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the policy is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_policies_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "param_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "param_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type (e.g., boolean, uint32) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter type is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possible_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated configuration */,
  "value" TEXT /* Possible value for the configuration parameter */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the value is the default value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possible_values_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log entry */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget associated with the log entry */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
